name: Carmel High School
description: Carmel High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carmel Hamlet, NY. There are 4 outdoor clay courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Edward Ryan Memorial Park
description: Edward Ryan Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in Carmel Hamlet, NY. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms, youth programming, and food.
hours: 8am - 4pm Website Disclaimer Government Websites by CivicPlus® Login

name: Hardscrabble Club
description: Hardscrabble Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brewster, NY. There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and locker rooms. Reservations are available.

name: PBL
description: Come play pickleball at PBL in North Highland, NY! There are 2 outdoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
